name: Client Operating Model Phase 4 Build Hierarchy Task Contracts
outcome_goal: Implement hierarchy and task-environment contract primitives: active path validation, owners/stewards, SOP refs, allowed tools/scopes/models/verifiers, append-only revisions, staleness, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not create task execution authority without a contract gate.
Do not mutate hierarchy history in place.
Do not broaden inherited policies implicitly.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_04_hierarchy_task_contracts_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 4 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_04_hierarchy_task_contracts/PLAN.md. Implement the smallest durable hierarchy/task contract substrate: hierarchy node/path validation, owner/steward resolution, SOP or SOP-gap refs, allowed tool/read/write/model/verifier policies, append-only revision semantics, staleness decisions, and typed invalid states. Keep it contract-first and queryable. Avoid broad runtime orchestration changes. Add focused tests for valid contracts, missing owner/steward, retired node, broadened scope, stale contract, and verifier policy. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_04_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and any Phase 11 surface needs. Do not stage or commit.
